name: Bug report

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to tab '...'
2. Select '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

- Python version:
